languages.text: {n}В голову приходит лишь одна мысль: изображенный на портрете Вольный Торговец был не чужд роскоши и авантюр.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}В голову приходит лишь одна мысль: этого человека был странный вкус.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В голову приходит лишь одна мысль: изображенный на портрете Вольный Торговец был не чужд роскоши и авантюр.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}
{n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}
{n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Solo se te ocurre una cosa. El Comerciante Independiente del retrato también entendía de lujos y de grandes aventuras.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Solo se te ocurre una cosa. El Comerciante Independiente del retrato también entendía de lujos y de grandes aventuras.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你心中只冒出一个念头：画像中的行商浪人，显然沉迷于奢华，也热衷于冒险。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你心中只冒出一个念头：画像中的行商浪人，显然沉迷于奢华，也热衷于冒险。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une seule pensée vous vient : le libre-marchand dépeint sur le portrait n'était étranger ni au luxe ni aux exploits les plus audacieux.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une seule pensée vous vient : le libre-marchand dépeint sur le portrait n'était étranger ni au luxe ni aux exploits les plus audacieux.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aklına tek bir düşünce geliyor: Portredeki Hür Tacir, lükse veya cüretkâr maceralara yabancı değilmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aklına tek bir düşünce geliyor: Portredeki Hür Tacir, lükse veya cüretkâr maceralara yabancı değilmiş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dir kommt nur ein einziger Gedanke: Dem Freihändler auf dem Porträt waren Luxus und waghalsige Abenteuer nicht unbekannt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dir kommt nur ein einziger Gedanke: Dem Freihändler auf dem Porträt waren Luxus und waghalsige Abenteuer nicht unbekannt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}過去の星々は、現代の星々と同じくらいテラから遠かったのだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Only one thing comes to mind: the stars of the past were as distant from Terra as those in the present day.{/n}
